title: Minimum XOR Sum of Two Arrays
titleCn: 两个数组最小的异或值之和

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,2], nums2 = [2,3] Output: 2 Explanation: Rearrange nums2 so that it becomes [3,2]. The XOR sum is (1 XOR 3) + (2 XOR 2) = 2 + 0 = 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Rearrange nums2 so that it becomes [3,2]. The XOR sum is (1 XOR 3) + (2 XOR 2) = 2 + 0 = 2.

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,0,3], nums2 = [5,3,4] Output: 8 Explanation: Rearrange nums2 so that it becomes [5,4,3]. The XOR sum is (1 XOR 5) + (0 XOR 4) + (3 XOR 3) = 4 + 4 + 0 = 8.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: Rearrange nums2 so that it becomes [5,4,3]. The XOR sum is (1 XOR 5) + (0 XOR 4) + (3 XOR 3) = 4 + 4 + 0 = 8.
